project_type: Python script-based Excel generator for insurance product presentation
build_system: None - standalone Python scripts using only standard library (zipfile, xml)
test_framework: None - verify by running the script and checking output file exists
test_command: python3 generate_mdwa_excel.py && python3 -c "import zipfile; z=zipfile.ZipFile('Kalkulator_MDWA.xlsx'); print(z.namelist()); z.close()"
verification_instructions: Run generate_mdwa_excel.py and verify Kalkulator_MDWA.xlsx is created with 7 sheets
snapshot_or_generated_files: Kalkulator_MDWA.xlsx is the generated output file
setup_instructions: No setup needed - uses only Python standard library
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot install packages. openpyxl is NOT available. Must use raw XML + zipfile approach (same as generate_excel.py). No pip install possible.
contribution_requirements: Use Indonesian language (with some English terms). No Chinese characters anywhere.
key_patterns: The existing generate_excel.py builds xlsx files using raw XML strings + zipfile.ZipFile. It constructs shared strings, styles, worksheets as XML strings and packages them into a valid xlsx. This same pattern must be used for the MDWA generator.
relevant_files: generate_excel.py (reference pattern for raw XML xlsx generation)
保费费率表.xlsx (to be DELETED - Chinese output)
directory_structure: Flat directory with PDFs (source docs), Python scripts (generators), and xlsx files (outputs)
